scripts.build: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const bin = path.join(__dirname, 'node_modules', '.bin', 'vite'); fs.existsSync(bin) && fs.chmodSync(bin, '0755');" && vite build
scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const bin = path.resolve('node_modules/.bin'); fs.existsSync(bin) && fs.readdirSync(bin).forEach(f => { try { fs.chmodSync(path.join(bin, f), '0755'); } catch(e){} });"
